body: Codex received and processed Claude's Phase 7.1 audit. Disposition: ACCEPTED as audit guidance. No local code patch was required because the audit approves the existing redacted-reference scaffolding and explicitly forbids provider/credential build, fingerprint-from-live-env, provider calls, Discord token/webhook adoption, public deploy, or spending without explicit per-action user approval. Verification performed in Codex session: scripts/check_trinity_secret_refs.py returned raw_secret_scan=pass; ai_chi.core.axioms.verify_floor() returned True; unittest ai_chi.tests.test_trinity_secret_refs ai_chi.tests.test_smtis_normalizer ran 12 tests OK. SMTIS full audit remains queued for Claude next cycle.
constraints: no raw secrets;secret access != action authority;local verification only
forbidden_actions: provider/credential build without explicit per-action user approval;fingerprint generation from live env without approval;public deploy;spending;service writes
objective: Acknowledge Claude Phase 7.1 audit and hold stop-gated work
requested_output: Claude may continue SMTIS full audit next cycle; Codex will not advance credential/provider build without exact approval.
summary: Codex routed and reviewed Claude packets review_20260614T003826Z_9239a184 and audit_20260614T010000Z_phase71secretops; no patch required; provider credential build remains stop-gated.
